titleStmt.title: SII 17.536: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 536. (A.R. No. 494 of 1904.) VĒDĀRAṆYAM, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the first prākāra in the Vēdāraṇyēśvara temple.
The details of date, viz., Makara ba••••, Wednesday, Tiruvōṇam are irregular.

This records the gift of 2(1/2) vēli and māgāṇi of land, originally purchased partly from Kuṇamalaippāḍi Uḍaiyān••••Pallavadaraiyar and partly from Nāgāṇḍāṉ of Anapāya-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Iḍaiyaḷa-nāḍu in Rājēndraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu by Tirumaṟaikkāḍuḍaiyāṉ Kaṟpagapperumān of Koḍumaḷūr, who owned lands in Vāyalūṟ Paḷḷi, in Kuṉṟūr-nāḍu, as tirunāmattukkāṇi to the god Tirumaṟaikkāḍu-uḍaiyār.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīirāceṉtiracoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 18 vatu makara nāyaṟṟuapara pakṣattu tiyaiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattu nāḷ Umpaḷanāṭṭu kuṉṟūr nāṭṭu vāyalūṟp paḷḷiyil kāṇiyuṭaiya koṭumaḷūr kiḻavaṉ tirumaṟaikkāṭuṭai
yāṉ kaṟpakapperumāneṉ Uṭaiyār tirumaṟaikkāṭṭuṭaiyārkku nāṉ tirunāmattukkāṇiyākak kuṭutta nilamāvatu Iṉnāṭṭuk kānattūr nāṭṭuk kānattūr ka raṉnaṟka tu kuṇamalaip pāṭi Uṭaiyān ruvumuṭaiyarāṉa pallavatarayar pa
kkal nāṉ vilaikoṇṭuṭaiyenāy Eṉnutāy nāṉ Aṉupavittu varukiṟa nilamāy viṭṭa nilam Oṉṟe mukkāleorumāvum Iṉṉila pāti Ūr nattattu maṉaikaḷilum maṉaippaṭaippaikaḷum Uṭpaṭavum rāceṉtiracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu Iṭaiyaḷanāṭṭu Aṉapāyac catuppetimaṅkalattu
nākāṇṭāṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭuṭaiyeṉāy Anupavittu varukiṟa koḻicceriyā neṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa nilattuk ttam Eṟṟi nilam mukkāle kāṇiyum Ākanilam Iraṇṭaraiye mākāṇiyum Iṉnilaṅkaḷāl varuvaṉa Eppaiyiṟppaṭṭaṉavu muḻ
ppaṭa tiruṉāmattukkāṇiyāka kuṭuttu kalveṭṭittanteṉ koṭumaḷūrkiḻavaṉ tirumaṟai kkāṭuṭaiyāṉā neṉ .
Digital edition of SII 17.536 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
